title: Triterpenes from Cαreyα αrboreα .· Structure of Careyagenol D
author: S. B. MAHATO
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Indian Institute of Exporimental Medicine, Calcutta-32 

  Manuscript received 28 November 1972; revised 28 February 1973; accepted 23 April 1973  

 From chemical and physico-chemical studies, the structure of careyagenol D isolated from the acid hydrolyzate of the saponin of seeds of  \(Careya\)   \(arborea\)  has been established as olean-12, 15-diene, -3 \(\beta\) , 21 \(\alpha\) , 22 \(\alpha\) , 28-tetrol (Ia). Besides this, three other polyhydroxy triterpenoid sapogenols characterised as barringtogenol C, barringtogenol D and 16-desoxy barringtogenol C have also been isolated.
